content: JetBrains Gateway: lightweight local launcher, IDE backend runs on remote server, JetBrains Client is thin local UI. Same editor features as local IDE (completion, navigation, inspections, refactoring). Connects via SSH or to hosted services (Gitpod, Google Cloud, Amazon CodeCatalyst, Coder). Plugin system mirrors local IDE. Supports all JetBrains IDEs. Source code never on local machine. Key differentiator: rich full-IDE UX vs browser-based editors; running compute stays on remote.
